findings.title: No dedicated test for NIL-uuid + brand_self_read yields 0 extra rows under brain_app
findings.detail: Analytically safe (membership subquery empty for nil user_id). Missing belt-and-suspenders test asserting nil-uuid GUC + wrong brand_id = 0 rows under brain_app. Add to pg.test.ts isolation-fuzz next sprint.

findings.title: dev_secret.secret_value stores plaintext OAuth token in dev Postgres
findings.detail: Accepted dev-vault pattern (same class as contact_pii dev stand-in). Prod hard-fail confirmed. Risk limited to local dev DB exposure. Add shared-dev-DB warning to migration comment before pattern spreads.
